productDisplayName: Spinn Men Texan Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this spinn Texan shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details Synthetic upper with overlays on the midfoot has central lacing Low at the ankle and high at the collar the shoe has a heavily padded meshing inside Thick, curved rubber midsole Single piece TPU outsole with concentric circular lugs Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
